'''âr-f-s-k''' ('''karafsekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woggle|woggle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-s-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woggle|woggle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-f-s-k
|-
! Lemma
| karafsekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirafsekoko|thirafsekoko]] || [[word:jirafsekoko|jirafsekoko]] || [[word:shirafsekoko|shirafsekoko]] || [[word:kirafsekoko|kirafsekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurafsekoko|thuthurafsekoko]] || [[word:jujurafsekoko|jujurafsekoko]] || [[word:shushurafsekoko|shushurafsekoko]] || [[word:kukurafsekoko|kukurafsekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrafsekoko|thĂŠrafsekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠrafsekoko|jĂŠrafsekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠrafsekoko|shĂŠrafsekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠrafsekoko|kĂŠrafsekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharafsekoko|thatharafsekoko]] || [[word:jajarafsekoko|jajarafsekoko]] || [[word:shasharafsekoko|shasharafsekoko]] || [[word:kakarafsekoko|kakarafsekoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharafsekoko|tharafsekoko]] || [[word:jarafsekoko|jarafsekoko]] || [[word:sharafsekoko|sharafsekoko]] || [[word:karafsekoko|karafsekoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
